whats_new.title: AI Vector Search
whats_new.description: Oracle AI Vector Search supports AI workloads by storing vector embeddings and querying data by semantic similarity inside Oracle Database.

whats_new.title: JSON-Relational Duality Views
whats_new.description: JSON-relational duality views let application data be accessed and updated as either JSON documents or relational tables.

whats_new.title: Property Graphs in SQL
whats_new.description: Oracle Database adds SQL property graph query support so graph relationships can be queried inside the database.

whats_new.title: Select AI enhancements
whats_new.description: Select AI extends natural-language database interaction and adds support for additional AI providers.

whats_new.title: Globally Distributed Database Raft replication
whats_new.description: Oracle Globally Distributed Database adds built-in Raft replication for distributed database deployments.

whats_new.title: SQL Firewall
whats_new.description: Oracle AI Database 26ai adds SQL Firewall capabilities to control which SQL can execute against the database.

whats_new.title: True Cache
whats_new.description: True Cache provides an automatically managed, consistent, mostly diskless cache for read-only workloads against Oracle AI Database.

whats_new.title: UCP asynchronous extension
whats_new.description: Universal Connection Pool adds asynchronous database-call support for scalable Java applications.

behavior_changes.title: Oracle Database release number changes
behavior_changes.description: The VERSION, VERSION_LEGACY, and VERSION_FULL release number values are updated in Oracle AI Database 26ai.

behavior_changes.title: SQL/JSON JSON_VALUE can return SQL BOOLEAN
behavior_changes.description: After COMPATIBLE is set to 23.0.0 or higher, SQL/JSON path item methods can return SQL BOOLEAN values.

behavior_changes.title: SYSDATE and SYSTIMESTAMP reflect PDB time zone
behavior_changes.description: SYSDATE and SYSTIMESTAMP can be managed separately for each database using the individual database time zone setting.

behavior_changes.title: Installation archives are digitally signed
behavior_changes.description: Oracle AI Database 26ai digitally signs installation archive files so deployments can verify package integrity.

behavior_changes.title: Version banner uses 26ai release numbering
behavior_changes.description: Oracle AI Database 26ai updates release-number reporting while retaining the underlying full version format used by the database.

deprecated.title: Oracle Enterprise Manager Database Express desupported
deprecated.description: Oracle Enterprise Manager Database Express is desupported in Oracle AI Database 26ai.

deprecated.title: Oracle Wallet Manager desupported
deprecated.description: Oracle Wallet Manager is desupported starting with Oracle AI Database 26ai.

deprecated.title: Traditional auditing desupported
deprecated.description: Traditional auditing is desupported in Oracle AI Database 26ai.

deprecated.title: DBUA and manual upgrade methods desupported
deprecated.description: AutoUpgrade and Replay Upgrade are the supported upgrade methods for Oracle AI Database 26ai; DBUA and manual upgrade methods are desupported.

deprecated.title: Oracle JDBC-OCI thick driver deprecated
deprecated.description: The Oracle JDBC OCI Type 2 client driver is deprecated in Oracle AI Database 26ai.

deprecated.title: RASADM desupported
deprecated.description: The Real Application Security GUI administration tool RASADM is desupported in Oracle AI Database 26ai; Oracle recommends using the RAS PL/SQL API.

deprecated.title: Legacy Oracle XML DB repository access paths reviewed
deprecated.description: Oracle AI Database 26ai upgrade guidance includes legacy XML DB and related component changes that require review during upgrade planning.
